column1: * Hold percentages and Hit Frequencies represent long term statistical probabilities.

column2: 40 lines fixed bet for 40 coins times the bet multiplier. Highest win pays left to right on paylines.
WildWolf Symbol is wild and substitutes for all symbols except the Bonus symbol.
Three Bonus symbols on middle reels pay 2x total bet and initiate Bonus with 5 bonus spins.
In the Bonus three Bonus symbols on middle reels pay 2x total bet and retrigger 5 additional bonus spins
up to a maximum of 255 bonus spins per bonus round.
The Fort Knox Bonus may be randomly triggered on any base game spin that does not trigger the Bonus. A random draw is made from the Trigger table to determine if the Fort Knox Bonus is triggered.
When the Fort Knox Bonus is triggered, a random draw is made from the Award table using the corresponding bet multiplier from the spin that triggered the Fort Knox Bonus,
to determine if the progressive or a fixed award with or without boost is awarded.
The listed average pay values have already been multiplied by the bet multiplier. The Copper, Silver, Gold, and Platinum No Boost awards scale directly with the bet multiplier.
The value listed for the Progressive award does not include the increment.
If an award with Boost A or Boost B is chosen, then a random draw is also made from the Scenario table corresponding to the award chosen.
Once the scenario is chosen and if a Boost award is determined, then the Boost values are determined from the corresponding Boost tables. Boost values are multiplied by the bet multiplier.
If an award with Boost A is chosen, a boost value is selected from the evenly weighted (1 - 6) Boost A table and is added to the No Boost award value.
For example, if at bet multiplier 1, Platinum Boost A is chosen, scenario 1 is chosen, and 5000 is chosen from the Boost A table, the total award is 25,000 + 5000 = 30,000.
If an award with Boost B is chosen, a boost value is selected from both the evenly weighted (1 - 6) Boost A and the evenly weighted (1 - 6) Boost B tables and is added to the No Boost award value.

For example, if at bet multiplier 2, Gold Boost B and scenario 2 are chosen, then a draw is made from the Scenario 2 Boost A and Scenario 2 Boost B tables and 1,250 and 750 are determined, respectively.
The Fort Knox Bonus ends after the prize is awarded.
* Volatility index represents how far from average actual payback can be 95% of the time after 10,000 games played.
The larger the index, the more volatile the game.
Top Single Award is the Progressive award in the Fort Knox Bonus.
Top Single Award Odds are 1 in 7,500,000 at min bet. Odds scale linearly with the bet.
